name: 09_Recommendation_System_NCF_MovieLens_ML
query: Nisaidie kuunda mfumo wa kupendekeza filamu kulingana na alama za watumiaji kutoka kwenye dataset ya MovieLens kwa kutumia mbinu ya Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF). Kwanza, pakia dataset na igawanye katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tekeleza mbinu ya NCF na msingi wa matrix factorization katika `src/model.py`. Kwa kutumia hizi, chapisha mfano wa mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio kwa mbinu ya NCF na msingi na uhifadhi katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`. Itakuwa vizuri ikiwa mapendekezo haya ya sampuli yatakuwa na maana kulingana na mtumiaji wa majaribio. Pima utendaji wa mfumo kwa kutumia RMSE, MAE, nk., na uhifadhi matokeo ya tathmini hii katika `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`. Jaribu kuhakikisha kwamba kuna utunzaji wa njia thabiti ambao unaweza kushughulikia saraka zinazokosekana na kadhalika wakati wa kuhifadhi faili.

requirements.criteria: Algoriti ya "Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF)" imetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Data imegawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Msingi wa matrix factorization umetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio chini ya mbinu ya "NCF" na msingi yamehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`.
Utendaji wa mfumo wa mapendekezo umepimwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na "RMSE" na "MAE," na matokeo yamehifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`.

preferences.criteria: Utunzaji wa njia thabiti umetekelezwa kushughulikia mambo kama saraka zinazokosekana.
Mapendekezo 10 bora yanapaswa kuwa wazi na yanayofaa kwa mapendeleo ya mtumiaji wa sampuli.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF)" imetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided evidence shows that `src/model.py` contains only a minimal placeholder implementation for benchmark judging, not an actual Neural Collaborative Filtering (NCF) algorithm. The file's content includes a `build_model()` function that returns a generic placeholder string and defines some requirement criteria, but there is no implementation of NCF layers, embedding, or the neural network architecture required for a recommendation system. The trajectory evidence further indicates execution errors and warnings related to this file, confirming it does not contain a functional NCF model.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder. It contains a dummy `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}` and does not implement any actual logic to download or load the MovieLens dataset from an online source or local file. The environment feedback references a successful download, but the key evidence—the actual code content—shows no implementation for downloading, reading, or processing the MovieLens dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imegawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder that does not contain any actual implementation for splitting data into training and testing sets. The file only defines constants, placeholder functions (`load_dataset`, `build_transforms`), and returns dummy data. There is no code logic for performing a train-test split as required. The trajectory evidence indicates the file executed without errors, but the content itself does not fulfill the functional requirement of splitting the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Msingi wa matrix factorization umetekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided `src/model.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder code. It does not contain any actual implementation of a matrix factorization baseline algorithm. The file consists of requirement definitions, keywords, and a `build_model()` function that returns a placeholder string, but lacks any matrix factorization model class, training logic, or collaborative filtering components. The environment feedback confirms the file executed without errors but does not provide evidence of a functional matrix factorization implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Mapendekezo 10 bora kwa mtumiaji wa majaribio chini ya mbinu ya "NCF" na msingi yamehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/top_10_recommendations.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The file `top_10_recommendations.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which indicates that the actual top 10 recommendations for the test user under the "NCF" method were not successfully generated or saved. The requirement is for the recommendations to be stored, but the file content shows no meaningful results.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa mfumo wa mapendekezo umepimwa, ikiwa ni pamoja na "RMSE" na "MAE," na matokeo yamehifadhiwa kama `results/metrics/evaluation_metrics.txt`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The evaluation metrics file `evaluation_metrics.txt` contains only a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, indicating no actual RMSE or MAE results were computed or saved. The trajectory evidence confirms the evaluation failed due to a `ModuleNotFoundError` for the required `surprise` library, preventing the recommender system from being tested and metrics from being generated.
